hero.subtitle: Capture every thought the moment it strikes — by text or voice — then triage it into Trello-style projects so nothing slips and everything ships.

ambient.0: Call the plumber about the kitchen sink
ambient.2: Draft the blog post on micro-apps
ambient.3: Book the team offsite for May
ambient.5: Add testimonial section to the site

capture.body: Watch a thought get caught in the inbox and ride into the list where it belongs — the exact flow Huginn runs on every day.

1.text: Call the plumber about the sink
1.label: Home

capture.title: Capture anywhere
capture.body: An always-open inbox for every passing thought. Type fast or hit voice for hands-free dictation.

projects.title: Trello-style projects
projects.body: Custom lists, drag-and-drop cards, labels, checklists, comments, attachments — the full kit, nothing missing.

team.title: Team-ready
team.body: Invite collaborators with role-based access. They accept, jump in, and you’re working on the same project in real time.

voice.body: Built on the browser’s native Web Speech API — no apps, no logins on other devices, no lag. Great for driving, walking the dog, or that two-second idea before it evaporates.

cta.body: Free while in beta. Takes 30 seconds to sign up. You’ll be in your inbox a minute from now.
